column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong hit probability and a reliable track record, reaching base safely in over 75% of his games and benefiting from the leadoff spot at home with the platoon advantage. Yandy Diaz offers similar reliability, riding a recent hot streak and also hitting atop the order with a favorable matchup. Nico Hoerner and Pete Crow-Armstrong are viable alternatives, but Edwards and Diaz stand out for consistency and matchup quality.
